input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.7.7 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.7.7
            TITLE: a front hoop that is not steel must have a 4 mm hole drilled in a location to access during

            rule F.5.7.7: A Front Hoop that is not steel must have a 4 mm hole drilled in a location to access during
F.5.7.7 A Front Hoop that is not steel must have a 4 mm hole drilled in a location to access during

final_answer: A Front Hoop that is not steel must have a 4 mm hole drilled in a location to access during Technical Inspection
